# tryphp.dev
> TryPHP: Effortlessly set up PHP on Linux with a single curl command.
> Simplifies installing PHP and related tools (Composer, extensions, presets).

## Main Pages
- [Home](https://tryphp.dev/): Overview and install commands for TryPHP.
- [Install Script](https://tryphp.dev/install.sh): The core installation script for the latest PHP.
- [PHP 7.4 Preset](https://tryphp.dev/7.4/install.sh): Install PHP 7.4 via curl.
- [PHP 8.1 Preset](https://tryphp.dev/8.1/install.sh): Install PHP 8.1 via curl.
- [PHP 8.2 Preset](https://tryphp.dev/8.2/install.sh): Install PHP 8.2 via curl.
- [PHP 8.3 Preset](https://tryphp.dev/8.3/install.sh): Install PHP 8.3 via curl.
- [PHP 8.4 Preset](https://tryphp.dev/8.4/install.sh): Install PHP 8.4 via curl.

## Presets
- [Laravel Preset](https://tryphp.dev/presets/laravel): Tailored installation for Laravel environments.
- [FrankenPHP Preset](https://tryphp.dev/presets/frankenphp): Tailored installation for the FrankenPHP environment.

## About
- TryPHP provides easy and fast PHP environment setup for developers and sysadmins.
- Includes multiple PHP versions, extension installation, and presets for popular frameworks.

## Contact & Contribution
- GitHub Repository: https://github.com/tryphp-dev
- License: Open source (review repository for license details)

## Optional
- FAQ section in page content: covers security, OS support, and contribution details.
